titleStmt.title: SII 28.280: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 280. (A.R. No. 434 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, on the north base of the maṇḍapa infront.

Records a minor order (chiṟu-muṟi) granting the temples of Tirukkāmīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār, Tāyilu-nalla-chōḷiśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, Poṉamparappiṉa-chōḷiśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār, as kāṇi to Chēramāṉ. The grantee was further given as kāṇi, 100 kuḻi of three crop wet-land each in the central portion (naḍuppaṟṟu) of Kuṟukkaipāḍi and Pākkaṉpāḍi as tax-free (iṟai-ili) land and 1000 kuḻi of varaku- growing dry-crop land each in Ilattipāḍi and Viśalūr. The grantee could enjoy the latter kāṇi as long as the sun and moon last. Kulaśēkhara-brahmarāyar and Chētarāya-brahmarāyar figure among signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ceramāṉākku ciṟumuṟi . Uṭaiyār tirukkāmīcuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilum Uṭaiyār tāyilu nalla coḷicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilum Uṭaiyār poṉamparappiṉa coḷicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilum Uṭpaṭa koyilkaḷum taṅkaḷukku kāṇiyāka tantom Ippaṭikku kāṇi Āka
Aṉupavittu potavum . taṅkaḷukku kāṇiyāka patiṉmuṉṟāvatu paṅkūṉi mātam mutal kuṟukkaipāṭiyil ḷañceyil naṭuppaṟṟile kār pācaṉa muṉpayircceyum nilattile Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṭainta kuḻi nūṟum pākkaṉpāṭiyil ṉañcey nilattil naṭuppaṟṟil Aṭainta Iṟaiyili kuḻi nūṟum Ilattipāṭiyil vara
ku viḷaiyum nilattil Aṭaikku kuḻi Āyiramum vicalūril varaku viḷaiyum nilattil Aṭaitta kuḻi Āyiramum Āka ṉañce kuḻi Irunūṟum puñcey kuḻi Iraṇṭāyiramum Olai piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu cantirātittavaraiyum kāṇiyāka Aṉupavittu potavum Ippaṭi kallum veṭṭikkoḷḷavum pāṟpatu
mutaliyār namaśivāya tevar Eḻuttu § ṉāyaṉār tirukkāmīśvara muṭaiyār Eḻuttu kulacekarappiramārāyar Eḻuttu tāyilum nalla paṭṭar Eḻuttu tirumeṟ taḷi Uṭaiyār Eḻuttu cetarāyapiramarāyar Eḻuttu Āṟakaḷuṟ koyil kaṇakku kāṇiyuṭaiya neṭuvāyiluṭaiyān piccan tirukāmicura veḷār Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 28.280 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
